/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libstator_core.so -o libstator_core.so CMakeFiles/stator_core.dir/src/params.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stator_core.dir/src/topology_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stator_core.dir/src/gmsh_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stator_core.dir/src/geometry_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stator_core.dir/src/mesh_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stator_core.dir/src/export_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stator_core.dir/src/batch_scheduler.cpp.o
